episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 335: The State of Sealed Product 2022
episode.description: James and Cliff break down all the latest in fast moving card prices, the latest MTGO Modern and Pioneer results, Cards to Watch and a lead an exploration on the topic of sealed Magic The Gathering product as an investment in 2022.
